title: ITALY enforcement action against Depurazione Acqua S.r.l. (15,000)
summary: Insufficient legal basis for data processing The Italian DPA has imposed a fine of EUR 15,000 on Depurazione Acqua S.r.l. The controller contacted a data subject in the context of direct marketing activities despite the data subject being registered in the Public Register of Objections. Therefore, the controller processed the data subject...
